metadata.method_name: Mode-A: closure-certified composition over disjunctive LLM reads (matched-coverage showdown)

data_provenance.note: gold atomic relations read off the realization model; query DEDUCTION-REQUIRED

H3_iteration_real.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

H3_iteration_gold.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

C2_on_vs_off.note: OFF never reads the query edge locally (s,t never co-occur), so its single-relation coverage is 0; Mode-A coverage IS the deduction-required bite recovered by the composition floor.

audit.interpretation: On all-sound networks Mode-A's closed query SET must contain gold (soundness of PC) -> zero-FP-conditional-on-soundness ~1.0; silent-wrong arises ONLY from unsound reads.

reads.sentence: The shareholder vote came after the maintenance window.
The shareholder vote came after the network upgrade.
The vendor negotiation occurred before the maintenance window.
The vendor negotiation came before the network upgrade.

H3_iteration_real.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

H3_iteration_gold.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

C2_on_vs_off.note: OFF never reads the query edge locally (s,t never co-occur), so its single-relation coverage is 0; Mode-A coverage IS the deduction-required bite recovered by the composition floor.

audit.interpretation: On all-sound networks Mode-A's closed query SET must contain gold (soundness of PC) -> zero-FP-conditional-on-soundness ~1.0; silent-wrong arises ONLY from unsound reads.

reads.sentence: The recruitment drive and the venue booking began together, but the recruitment drive ended first.
The recruitment drive and the trademark dispute occurred over precisely the same interval.
The maintenance window and the venue booking ended together, but the maintenance window began later.
The maintenance window began exactly as the trademark dispute ended.
The design review and the curriculum update spanned exactly the same period.
The design review started at the very moment the board meeting finished.
The site inspection finished at the very moment the curriculum update started.
The site inspection and the board meeting ended together, but the site inspection began later.

verdict.headline: H1 CONFIRMED on all arms (Mode-A > PoT AND > SC at matched coverage, Holm). point: vs POT Δ=+0.043(sig), vs SC Δ=+0.146(sig) | allen: vs POT Δ=+0.676(sig), vs SC Δ=+0.641(sig)

cross_algebra_synthesis.finding: The closure advantage over neural per-path reasoning scales with relation-algebra richness: on the 3-relation convex point algebra a strong neural baseline (Path-of-Thoughts) already composes correctly, so Mode-A TIES it (gap~0) while still beating self-consistency; on the 13-relation Allen interval algebra (NP-hard consistency) neural per-path chaining collapses and Mode-A's symbolic closure dominates ALL baselines.

verdict.scope: REAL-LLM-READ-ON-SYNTHETIC; point=PC-complete exact arm, allen=NP-hard lower-bound generality

cost.note: cumulative_openrouter_usd is THIS final run's billed calls; total_openrouter_usd_all_runs_from_cache sums the cost field over every SHA-256 cache file (dev pilot + mini smoke + an interrupted/restarted test run + this run) = the authoritative total OpenRouter spend, well under the $9 hard cap.

H3.page_p_note: Per-slice Page's-L p computed correctly (20 blocks x |HOP| conditions); order ~1e-4..1e-8 depending on slice and N. The paper's earlier '1e-13' was a mis-statement; values clamped to a 1e-12 floor are flagged page_p_used_floor=true.

metadata.method_name: Closure-Certified Composition over Span-LOCAL LLM reads (Mode-A) -- LOCAL-reader real-text head-to-head + end-to-end Prolog
metadata.description: Tests whether iterated path-consistency CLOSURE over span-LOCAL LLM reads of constituent path edges recovers deduction-required temporal relations the local reads alone cannot, beating Path-of-Thoughts, self-consistency, raw local LLM, and naive single-pass at MATCHED coverage (H1), and cutting the confident-wrong hallucination rate vs a raw LLM (H2), on the FROZEN ACTUAL NarrativeTime + TDDMan gold graphs, with a SWI-Prolog-discharged trace and a $0 fully-powered synthetic matched-coverage backstop. Closure runs in the PC-complete convex point start-point algebra.

headline_findings.tags: every number tagged REAL-LLM-READ / SYNTHETIC-CHANNEL / GOLD-ONLY-GATE / THEOREM

metadata.TAG_THEOREM: closure engine (pc2_full) + point-algebra PC-completeness are THEOREM-grade; all closure outputs are sound certificates.

gate_validation_matres.expected: ~0 (MATRES is intra/adjacent only -> near-empty deduction envelope)

stronger_reader_gate_test.interpretation: If the STRONGER reader still does not cross the gate, the binding constraint is real-text LOCAL read soundness (the bottleneck), not the closure step. If it crosses, the bottleneck was a weak-model artifact.

stronger_reader_sample_closure.note: Mode-A closure over the STRONGER reader's local reads on the bounded NT sample.

H1_matched_coverage.note: gap = Mode-A selective acc at its natural coverage MINUS baseline acc at the SAME coverage; doc-clustered paired bootstrap; Holm-Bonferroni across the confirmatory family.

worked_examples_prolog.program:
% Closure-certified temporal deduction -- auto-generated trace program.
% Convex point start-point algebra over event start points {lt,eq,gt}.
% The query relation is the INTERSECTION of all length-2 path compositions
% (path-consistency narrowing); an empty intersection certifies inconsistency.
:- discontiguous rel/3.

% --- composition table (Vilain-Kautz convex point algebra) ---
comp(lt,lt,lt).
comp(lt,eq,lt).
comp(eq,lt,lt).
comp(eq,eq,eq).
comp(eq,gt,gt).
comp(gt,eq,gt).
comp(gt,gt,gt).

% --- read facts (LOCAL LLM reads; both directions via converse) ---
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei104,lt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei104,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,gt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei102,gt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei102,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,lt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei109,lt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei109,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,gt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei110,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei102,gt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei102,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei110,lt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei110,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei109,gt).
rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei109,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei110,lt).

% --- query: intersect every e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107->M->e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei110 composition ---
path_comp(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei110,R) :- rel(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,M,R1), rel(M,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei110,R2), comp(R1,R2,R).
main :- ( setof(R, path_comp(e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei107,e_ea980120_1830_0456__ei110,R), Rs) -> format('PATHS: ~w~n',[Rs]) ; write('PATHS: none'), nl ), halt.

:- initialization(main).

:- discontiguous rel/3.

rel(e_APW19980418_0210__ei2130,e_APW19980418_0210__ei2142,lt).
rel(e_APW19980418_0210__ei2142,e_APW19980418_0210__ei2130,gt).

rel(e_APW19980418_0210__ei2147,e_APW19980418_0210__ei2140,gt).

worked_examples_prolog.note: closure detected inconsistency among local reads -> Mode-B ABSTAIN

synthetic_backstop.note: recall 0.96, 600 networks/cell, NO LLM, $0. Carries the matched-coverage mechanism claim if real text is thin.

metadata.interpretation: VERDICT=PARTIAL/SCOPE-BOUNDARY. Exactly one gateway cleared: H1=False H2=True. Report which holds; scope the claim. Stronger reader (deepseek-v4-pro) NT recall=0.897 < gate 0.9 => read-soundness bottleneck is NOT a weak-model artifact (load-bearing headline). SYNTHETIC backstop (recall 0.96): mean Mode-A matched-coverage gap vs raw=+0.225, vs PoT=+nan -> the closure mechanism WORKS when reads are sound; the real-text result isolates whether local read soundness is the binding constraint. WARNING: <70 deduction queries scored -> real-text headline UNDERPOWERED; lean on the synthetic + stronger-reader-recall evidence.

examples.input: There was no decision on a [[E1]]meeting[[/E1]] . Meanwhile, Egypt's official Middle East News Agency said Thursday that Saddam was the target of an assassination [[E2]]attempt[[/E2]] , which led to ``large-scale'' arrests , including some close associates of the Iraqi strongman.

APW19980418.0210
    NEWS STORY 04/18/1998 06:07:00 
    w1416 Cx1f wstm-
    r i Cx13 Cx11 BC-Hungary-Astronaut 04-18 0248
    BC-Hungary-Astronaut
    First and only Hungarian astronaut moving to the United States
    BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) _ Tired of being sidelined, Hungarian astronaut Bertalan Farkas is [[E1]]leaving[[/E1]] for the United States to start a new career, he said Saturday . However, cited by District of Columbia traffic police in December for driving under the influence of alcohol, Farkas was [[E2]]ordered[[/E2]] home and retired .

CBS News first reported last night that the tomb may [[E1]]contain[[/E1]] the remains of Air Force pilot Michael Blassie. Blassie's mother now [[E2]]wants[[/E2]] the remains in the tomb tested for DNA.

In Washington, Pentagon spokesman Pete Williams said Iraq has continued to increase its armed forces in Kuwait and they now [[E1]]number[[/E1]] about 160,000. He also said of trade with Iraq: ``There are no shipments at the moment .'' A day earlier , scores of trucks, many with Iraqi license plates, [[E2]]streamed[[/E2]] north out of Aqaba to Amman and onto the desert highway bound for Iraq.

With American astronaut Jon McBride, Farkas [[E1]]set[[/E1]] up an American-Hungarian joint venture called Orion 1980, manufacturing space-travel related technology. However, cited by District of Columbia traffic police in December for [[E2]]driving[[/E2]] under the influence of alcohol, Farkas was ordered home and retired .

The long distance giant [[E1]]slashing[[/E1]] up to eighteen thousand jobs, freezing executive salaries and shaking up management. But I think right now, for AT and T and the people here, it's fairly [[E2]]intense[[/E2]] as you might w- well imagine.

It's the second day of an [[E1]]offensive[[/E1]] by the security forces against villages populated by ethnic Albanians. The ethnic Albanians here in Kosovo are considerably [[E2]]worried[[/E2]] about the future and fear they are witnessing the beginnings of a much wider conflict.

The Pentagon said today it will re-examine the question are the remains inside the Tomb of the Unknown from the Vietnam War, in fact, [[E1]]known[[/E1]]? There was a suspicion the body was Blassie because his uniform and ID card were [[E2]]found[[/E2]] near the body in Vietnam.

But I think right now, for AT and T and the people here, it's fairly [[E1]]intense[[/E1]] as you might w- well imagine. I think it's a good thing that they're finally going to be [[E2]]downsizing[[/E2]] you know some management because there is a whole lot of waste.

There were more accounts of people fleeing from the villages near where the offensive was [[E1]]taking[[/E1]] place. The ethnic Albanians here in Kosovo are considerably [[E2]]worried[[/E2]] about the future and fear they are witnessing the beginnings of a much wider conflict.
